full_text:
Huang Chengyan 黃承彦
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Huang Chengyan (黃承彦). Father of Zhuge Liang’s wife. A prominent scholar of the Later Han Dynasty. Huang Chengyan was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.
